methods.method: Granger causality (linear lead-lag) and Transfer Entropy — preferably CONDITIONAL/MULTIVARIATE Transfer Entropy (directional info-flow: does information arrival lead the series?)
methods.measures: directed information flow / lead-lag: whether the past of an information-arrival series improves prediction of a target series (and vice-versa) beyond the target's own past
methods.inputType: ≥2 stationary, event-time-aligned time series; conditioning set Z of putative common drivers for multivariate TE
methods.assumptions: Granger: linearity, stationarity, correct lag order, no unmodeled common cause; TE: enough data for entropy estimation, chosen embedding/lag; both assume a (possibly fixed) delay structure
methods.failureModes: THE high-risk stage. Bivariate TE/Granger INVENT spurious edges from common drivers (a macro shock moves both news and price → false 'news causes price') and from indirect chains; non-stationarity → spurious causality; over-fitting lag order; finite-sample TE is biased upward; fixed-delay assumption fails in markets; and the absolute trap for a human — reading a significant lead-lag edge as a trading signal
methods.rigorNotes: Where the user's rigor demand is actually met or failed. Mandatory protocol: (1) stationarity-test every series first — ADF AND KPSS on RETURNS not prices (prices are non-stationary and produce textbook spurious results); difference/transform until stationary. (2) Prefer CONDITIONAL / MULTIVARIATE transfer entropy conditioning on common drivers (index/sector/macro) to kill common-driver and chain spuriousness that bivariate TE cannot; greedy conditioning to build the info-flow graph. (3) Use EFFECTIVE transfer entropy (subtract shuffled-surrogate bias) to correct finite-sample upward bias. (4) Significance via SURROGATE DATA — IAAFT surrogates preserve autocorrelation/spectrum so you don't reject the null just because the series is autocorrelated (time-shift surrogates as a cheaper screen). (5) Because thousands of pairs are tested, apply FDR control — Benjamini-Hochberg, and Benjamini-YEKUTIELI when test statistics are cross-sectionally correlated (which they are in markets). (6) Guard look-ahead/survivorship via the bitemporal layer. (7) OUTPUT = an annotated, significance-tested, effect-sized, FDR-surviving directional edge WITH caveats — explicitly framed as 'information X led series Y at lag k (q<0.05, effect size e), not a recommendation.' Granger is the cheap linear first pass; conditional TE is the nonlinear confirmatory pass on survivors.
methods.cost: Granger: cheap (VAR/F-test). Bivariate TE: moderate. Conditional/multivariate TE + IAAFT surrogates + FDR across many pairs: the most expensive analytic in the layer — but cost is bounded by MI-screening the pair set first and by single-node batch scheduling. Time is explicitly not the constraint; rigor is.

methods.method: GraphRAG-style hierarchical map-reduce community summarization (leaf→root LLM summaries → ranked keywords + clustered conclusions)
methods.measures: hierarchical summarization: nested theme summaries; extraction of ranked keywords and clustered conclusions per community/level — the user's final deliverable
methods.inputType: the Leiden/BERTopic community hierarchy + element (node/edge/claim) summaries + importance ranks + significance-tested info-flow edges
methods.assumptions: communities are coherent enough to summarize; element prioritization by prominence (degree) and credibility is sound; LLM faithfully summarizes provided evidence without hallucinating beyond it
methods.failureModes: LLM hallucination / unsupported synthesis; summary inherits any upstream bias (if a community is a pump cluster, its summary launders the pump into a clean-looking 'conclusion'); lossy aggregation hides dissent/minority signal; crossing the line from 'summary of evidence' into an implicit recommendation
methods.rigorNotes: Map-reduce per GraphRAG: (Map) summarize chunks of each community's elements in parallel, prioritizing high source+target degree AND high credibility; score helpfulness; (Reduce) roll leaf summaries up into parent-community reports to the root. Every summary must CITE its supporting nodes/edges/claims with provenance and as-of time (bitemporal), expose the credibility mix, and carry forward the info-flow caveats verbatim. Hard guardrail: the prompt/spec forbids buy/sell/price-target language — output is ranked keywords + clustered conclusions + evidence + caveats, leaving the judgment to the human. Keep summaries reproducible (fixed model/version, logged inputs).
methods.cost: Dominant LLM cost in the layer, but bounded: summarize COMMUNITIES not raw items, reuse element summaries across levels, and recompute only changed communities incrementally. Cost-tiered by only summarizing communities above an importance/credibility threshold.

methods.recommendedPipeline: Sequence into ONE defensible layer, each stage feeding the next, with cheap filters before expensive LLM/causality work (honoring the cost-tiering and scale-asymmetry constraints). STAGE 0 — CHEAP PRE-FILTER (run on everything, no LLM): exact/near-exact dedup → embedding-similarity collapse of near-duplicates → salience + SOURCE-CREDIBILITY scoring (DART/SEC/exchange high; 종토방/Reddit/X/Telegram low). Only survivors proceed to expensive extraction. STAGE 1 — ENTITY RESOLUTION (prerequisite, before ANY graph metric): deterministic identifier join (ticker/ISIN/CIK/DART corp_code) → multilingual-embedding blocking → LLM adjudication of ambiguous KR+EN pairs only; collapse 삼성전자=Samsung Electronics=005930 into single canonical nodes; record every merge bitemporally. If nodes don't collapse here, everything downstream is noise. STAGE 2 — BI-TEMPORAL GRAPH CONSTRUCTION: write LLM-extracted entities/relations/claims as edges, each stamped with event-time (valid) and ingest-time (transaction); edge weights fold co-occurrence × recency × source-credibility. All later computation is parameterized by an as-of (T_transaction, T_valid) window → no look-ahead. STAGE 3 — IMPORTANCE: credibility-weighted Personalized-PageRank with TrustRank teleport seeded on regulator/filing nodes as the primary rank; annotate with HITS authority (primary-source check), k-core (cohesion/periphery filter), eigenvector & sampled betweenness as secondary lenses; report provenance-decomposed scores so TRUE outranks LOUD and a human sees why. STAGE 4 — CLUSTERING (dual + fused): recursive Leiden on the credibility-weighted graph for the structural nested community hierarchy; in parallel BERTopic (multilingual SBERT → UMAP[fixed seed] → HDBSCAN → c-TF-IDF) for the semantic theme hierarchy; FUSE — agreement between a graph community and an embedding-density topic is strong evidence the theme is real, not artifact; route HDBSCAN noise to the credibility filter, not into themes. STAGE 5 — CORRELATION→INFO-FLOW (gated, rigor-critical, NEVER a signal): build event-time information-arrival series (credibility-weighted mention/sentiment rates) and align to price/volume/other series; ADF+KPSS stationarity → transform to returns/stationary rates; MI screen to pick candidate pairs cheaply; Granger linear first pass; CONDITIONAL/MULTIVARIATE effective transfer entropy (condition on index/sector/macro common drivers, subtract surrogate bias) as the nonlinear confirmatory pass; IAAFT surrogate significance; Benjamini-Hochberg / Benjamini-Yekutieli FDR across all pairs; emit only FDR-surviving, effect-sized, caveated DIRECTIONAL EDGES annotated onto the graph. STAGE 6 — HIERARCHICAL SUMMARIZATION: GraphRAG map-reduce over the Leiden/BERTopic hierarchy, prioritizing high-degree + high-credibility elements, rolling leaf→root; each summary cites provenance + as-of time, exposes credibility mix, carries info-flow caveats verbatim, and is FORBIDDEN from buy/sell/price-target language. OUTPUT: ranked keywords + nested clustered conclusions + evidence + caveats — a navigable structure the HUMAN judges on. Cadence: Stages 0-2 incremental/streaming-batch; Stages 3-6 scheduled batch + incremental on deltas, single-node graph+vector store — Kafka/Spark/distributed-Neo4j explicitly unjustified at 1-2 consumers.
risks: Entity-resolution failure is the dominant existential risk: any under-merge (삼성전자≠Samsung Electronics) fragments the graph and silently invalidates every centrality, cluster, and causality number; any over-merge (Samsung Electronics≡Samsung SDI) fabricates edges. Identifier anchoring + a labeled KR+EN gold set + bitemporal reversibility are mandatory, not optional.

Look-ahead / survivorship contamination: if event-time vs ingest-time isn't enforced everywhere (including the info-flow series and delisted entities), a human draws an as-of-T 'conclusion' using facts that arrived after T — quietly fatal to a tool whose whole purpose is honest human judgment.

Loudness-as-importance: any centrality computed on an unweighted graph over adversarial 종토방/Reddit/Telegram data ranks coordinated pump volume. Credibility MUST live in edge weights AND teleport, and the score must be provenance-decomposed; raw eigenvector centrality is especially unsafe here (no teleport escape, trivially gamed).

Spurious causality is the rigor failure most likely to look impressive: bivariate TE/Granger on non-stationary price levels will produce confident, wrong, common-driver-induced 'X causes Y' edges. Without ADF/KPSS + conditional/multivariate effective TE + IAAFT surrogates + FDR (Benjamini-Yekutieli under correlated tests), this layer manufactures exactly the false rigor the user is paying to avoid.

Boundary erosion into trading signals: a significant lead-lag edge or a glossy community summary is one bad sentence away from an implicit buy/sell. Hard guardrails (forbidden vocabulary, caveats carried verbatim, edges framed as evidence not advice) must be enforced in the summarization prompts and reviewed — the constraint is that AI structures, the human decides.

LLM/summarization hallucination and bias-laundering: a pump-cluster summary can launder manipulation into a clean 'conclusion'. Every summary must cite provenance, expose its credibility mix, and never assert beyond supplied evidence; otherwise the polished output is more dangerous than raw data.

Reproducibility drift: UMAP/Leiden stochasticity, LLM model-version changes, and resolution-parameter sensitivity can make 'conclusions' non-reproducible. Fix seeds, pin model versions, log inputs, and report cluster stability (consensus / variation of information) rather than single fragile partitions.

Multilingual embedding weakness can fragment a KR theme from its EN equivalent, producing duplicate or split clusters that misstate importance; validate cross-lingual co-clustering on held-out KR+EN pairs and prefer a strong multilingual encoder.

constraints.summary: Entity resolution for this bilingual KR+EN graph is NOT a flat "one node per company" problem — that model provably cannot represent the verified Samsung facts. The make-or-break decision is a THREE-LEVEL canonical store: Issuer (legal entity) -> Security (instrument) -> Listing (venue line), mirroring LEI -> ISIN/FIGI-ShareClass -> FIGI-Composite/ticker. This dissolves the two hardest traps structurally instead of special-casing them: (a) common vs preferred shares are DIFFERENT securities under the SAME issuer (verified: Samsung common ISIN KR7005930003 / KRX 005930 / OTC SSNLF vs preferred ISIN KR7005931001 / KRX 005935 / OTC SSNNF); (b) ADR/OTC/GDR lines are extra LISTINGS, not new entities. Official IDs (corp_code 00126380, CIK 879316, ISIN, LEI) are immutable keys; tickers/cashtags/names/slang are time-scoped ALIAS edges — never keys — because tickers get reused (verified: $V was Vivendi pre-2008, Visa after). Because the canonical universe is BOUNDED and enumerable (~all KOSPI/KOSDAQ/SEC issuers, tens of thousands), mention resolution is gazetteer-anchored entity LINKING (mention->known-KB-entry), not open-ended dedup of millions — a major simplifier that reinforces single-node/DuckDB and rules out Spark/distributed. ER and bi-temporal correctness (constraint #2) interlock: alias and listing edges carry [valid_from, valid_to), so "$V as-of-2007" resolves differently than "as-of-2026". The recommendation is a gated hybrid pipeline, deterministic-first, with a closed-set LLM tier that can ABSTAIN — abstention is a feature given the meta-constraint (AI structures, human judges).

evaluations.name: Deterministic official-ID join (corp_code / CIK / ISIN / LEI / FIGI cross-walk)
evaluations.whatItIs: Build the canonical company-master by exact-joining authoritative registries: DART corp_code (8-digit, e.g. Samsung 00126380, distinct from stock_code 005930), SEC EDGAR CIK (Samsung 879316, /FI foreign issuer), ISIN (common KR7005930003 vs preferred KR7005931001), GLEIF LEI at issuer level, and OpenFIGI for security/venue tiers (Share-Class FIGI links one instrument across countries; Composite FIGI links venue-level lines within a country). No probability — pure key equality and curated cross-reference tables.
evaluations.fitForThisCase: This is the SPINE and must run first. It is the only layer that gives zero-false-merge guarantees, which directly answers constraint #1 (false merges = graph becomes noise). It is effectively free (constraint #4 LLM-cost: no LLM) and trivially single-node (constraint #5). It natively spans KR+US because corp_code and CIK are both first-class issuer keys joined under one LEI. It is what makes the issuer/security/listing decomposition real: FIGI's three documented tiers map 1:1 onto the three node levels.
evaluations.assumptionsOrFailureModes: Cannot resolve free-text mentions in news/communities (no key to join on) — covers structured registry data only, so it is necessary but not sufficient. Cross-walk completeness is the risk: LEI coverage for smaller KOSDAQ issuers is not guaranteed (FSC mandates LEI for foreign-entity accounts and GLEIF is free to query, but not every domestic issuer has one) — so LEI is 'top key WHERE available' and corp_code+CIK remain the guaranteed issuer keys. ISIN-vendor and FIGI mappings need periodic refresh; a ticker column must NEVER be used as a join key.
evaluations.cost: Near-zero compute. One-time cross-walk build + nightly delta refresh from DART corp_code zip, EDGAR company_tickers.json, GLEIF Golden Copy, OpenFIGI API. Runs on a laptop.

evaluations.name: Probabilistic record linkage (Splink / Fellegi-Sunter) for company-master construction
evaluations.whatItIs: When the same issuer appears across registries/vendors with no shared key (name + country + address + incorporation date only), use Fellegi-Sunter match-weights (m/u probabilities, agreement/disagreement evidence summed to a log-likelihood weight, two thresholds for match/non-match/review) via Splink on a DuckDB backend.
evaluations.fitForThisCase: Earns its place narrowly: merging DART vs SEC vs data-vendor issuer records into ONE issuer node when official IDs don't already bridge them. Splink on DuckDB links ~1M records in minutes on a laptop — squarely inside constraint #5 (single-node, no Spark). Provides the mathematical rigor the user demands: explicit m/u probabilities and tunable thresholds rather than ad-hoc fuzzy rules. Term-frequency adjustments matter for KR where '삼성'/'Samsung' tokens are extremely common and must be down-weighted.
evaluations.assumptionsOrFailureModes: Do NOT frame the whole pipeline as generic record linkage — the bounded gazetteer makes most resolution a linking (not dedup) problem, so Splink is a supporting actor for master-build, not the main engine. Requires labeled pairs / EM training and a held-out gold set to set thresholds honestly. Pure name similarity will wrongly merge parent and subsidiary (삼성전자 vs 삼성SDI vs 삼성물산) — must inject MUST-NOT-LINK constraints (different LEI/corp_code, or known parent/subsidiary edge from DART 기업집단).
evaluations.cost: Low: DuckDB single-node, minutes per run, no cluster. Main cost is human labeling of the gold/training set.

evaluations.name: Cross-lingual embedding + romanization candidate generation (LaBSE + blocking)
evaluations.whatItIs: For free-text mentions, generate candidate KB entries via (a) deterministic alias/romanization tables (Revised Romanization + market-standard English names) and (b) LaBSE multilingual sentence embeddings (109 languages, shared dual-encoder) to place '삼성전자' and 'Samsung Electronics' near each other in one vector space; ANN search over the gazetteer's name embeddings does blocking/candidate-gen.
evaluations.fitForThisCase: This is the KR+EN bridge for unstructured ingest (news, 종토방, Reddit, Telegram) — the part deterministic joins can't touch. Embedding ANN is the blocking step that keeps the expensive LLM tier cheap (constraint #4): only top-k candidates per mention get escalated. Single-node FAISS/pgvector is ample for tens-of-thousands of canonical names and tiny serving load (constraint #5).
evaluations.assumptionsOrFailureModes: LaBSE + romanization MISS Korean community slang and contractions: 삼전=삼성전자, 하닉=SK하이닉스, 형님/God주 etc. are not romanization-derivable and not semantically near the formal name. These require an LLM alias-MINING pass over community text proposing candidate aliases, gated by human confirmation before an alias edge is trusted. Embedding similarity also pulls in confusable siblings (Samsung Electronics vs Samsung SDI vs Samsung Biologics) — it is candidate-GENERATION only, never the final decision; disambiguation is deferred to the gated LLM + must-not-link clustering. Cashtag noise ($X ambiguous across markets) handled at the alias-edge layer with market context.
evaluations.cost: Low-moderate: one embedding model (local or cheap API), ANN index in RAM. Alias-mining LLM passes are periodic/batch, not per-item.

evaluations.name: End-to-end LLM entity resolution (LLM free-generates the entity)
evaluations.whatItIs: Hand each crawled mention to an LLM and let it output the resolved company / ID directly from its own knowledge, with no constrained candidate set.
evaluations.fitForThisCase: Poor fit on every axis. Violates constraint #4: LLM-ing every crawled item is exactly the cost blow-up the tiering is meant to prevent. Free-generation hallucinates IDs and silently FALSE-MERGES — the precise failure mode constraint #1 forbids (graph becomes noise). It also injects an opaque, non-auditable judgment, brushing against the meta-constraint that the AI must structure, not decide, and must remain inspectable by the 1-2 human consumers.
evaluations.assumptionsOrFailureModes: Assumes LLM has correct, current ID mappings (it does not — tickers reuse over time, e.g. $V; preferred vs common ISINs differ by one digit and are routinely confused). No abstention, no provenance, unbounded cost. Only acceptable role is the CONSTRAINED variant in the recommended pipeline.
evaluations.cost: High and unbounded — one expensive call per crawled item across a heavy continuous ingest. Explicitly ruled out by constraint #4.

evaluations.name: Gated hybrid pipeline: deterministic -> blocking -> closed-set LLM-with-abstain -> constrained clustering -> bi-temporal alias/listing edges (RECOMMENDED)
evaluations.whatItIs: Layered cascade. (1) Deterministic official-ID resolution against the bounded gazetteer. (2) Cheap pre-filters BEFORE any LLM: exact/dedup, embedding-similarity, salience/mention-detection — to honor constraint #4. (3) Embedding+romanization+alias blocking -> top-k candidates. (4) ONLY ambiguous residue escalated to an LLM constrained to CHOOSE among candidate gazetteer entries WITH AN EXPLICIT ABSTAIN option (closed-set classification, never free-generation). (5) Constrained clustering with MUST-LINK (shared official ID) and MUST-NOT-LINK (different ISIN, or parent/subsidiary edge) hard constraints. (6) Resolution writes time-scoped alias and listing edges [valid_from,valid_to). Abstain/low-confidence -> 'unresolved mentions' review queue, never a silent force-link.
evaluations.fitForThisCase: Best satisfies ALL five constraints simultaneously. #1: deterministic-first + closed-set + must-not-link minimizes false merges; abstain prevents noise injection. #2: bi-temporal alias/listing edges give point-in-time-correct resolution ($V->Vivendi as-of-2007). #3: feeds source-credibility (the unresolved queue and provenance survive into ranking; resolution stays separate from importance so LOUD doesn't beat TRUE). #4: each tier is a cheaper gate before the next, LLM touches only the hard residue. #5: every component is single-node (DuckDB+Splink, FAISS/pgvector, local/cheap LLM) — no Kafka/Spark/distributed-Neo4j. Meta-constraint: abstention + human review queue means AI structures, human judges.
evaluations.assumptionsOrFailureModes: Requires a maintained gazetteer (the bounded universe assumption — true for KR+US listed equities, degrades for pre-IPO/private mentions, which should route to the unresolved queue, not be force-resolved). Needs a hand-labeled gold set + ER metrics (B-cubed precision/recall for cluster quality, pairwise P/R, FS match-weight thresholds) to tune and monitor. Operational burden is the human review queue, but with only 1-2 consumers that is acceptable and intended.
evaluations.cost: Low aggregate: most items die in cheap deterministic/dedup/embedding tiers; LLM cost is bounded to the ambiguous residue. All single-node, laptop/one-server scale.

constraints.recommendation: Adopt the GATED HYBRID pipeline on a THREE-LEVEL canonical store. Structure first, resolve second. (A) Model Issuer -> Security -> Listing as the spine: issuer keyed by LEI-where-available with corp_code (DART, e.g. 00126380) + CIK (EDGAR, e.g. 879316) as guaranteed keys; security keyed by ISIN + Share-Class FIGI (common KR7005930003 and preferred KR7005931001 are SEPARATE securities under ONE issuer); listing keyed by Composite/venue FIGI (KRX 005930, KRX-pref 005935, OTC SSNLF, OTC-pref SSNNF, ADR/GDR lines). This single decision dissolves the preferred/common trap and the ADR/multi-venue trap without special-casing. (B) Treat every ticker, cashtag, romanization, and community-slang form (삼전, 하닉) as a TIME-SCOPED alias edge with [valid_from,valid_to) — never a key — because tickers are reused over time ($V = Vivendi then Visa). This is where ER and bi-temporal modeling interlock: resolution is always 'as-of' a date. (C) Resolve mentions as gazetteer-anchored LINKING, not million-record dedup, because the listed universe is bounded — this is the simplifier that justifies single-node DuckDB/Splink + FAISS/pgvector and rules OUT Kafka/Spark/distributed-Neo4j (constraint #5). (D) Cascade: deterministic official-ID join -> cheap pre-filters (dedup/embedding-sim/salience) -> LaBSE+romanization+alias blocking to top-k -> closed-set LLM that picks among candidates OR ABSTAINS (never free-generates) -> constrained clustering with must-link (shared ID) / must-not-link (different ISIN; parent vs subsidiary from DART 기업집단) -> write bi-temporal alias/listing edges. Abstain and low-confidence go to a human review queue, never a silent merge. (E) Use Splink/Fellegi-Sunter only for issuer-master construction across registries, with term-frequency down-weighting of common KR tokens (삼성/Samsung). (F) Keep ETF-constituent and parent/subsidiary as relationship EDGES (time-varying holdings weight; ownership hierarchy) that CONSUME resolved entities — they are not identity ER. (G) Govern with rigor: hand-labeled gold set, B-cubed precision/recall for cluster quality, pairwise P/R, and explicit FS m/u match-weight thresholds. Crucially, keep resolution SEPARATE from importance ranking so source-credibility (constraint #3) can fold provenance in later and TRUE is not buried under LOUD.
risks: Gazetteer staleness / coverage gaps: newly-listed, pre-IPO, private, or foreign-cross-listed entities may be absent. Mitigation: missing-key mentions route to the unresolved-review queue, never force-resolved to the nearest name (false merge = the #1 failure mode).

LEI under-coverage for smaller KOSDAQ issuers means LEI cannot be the SOLE issuer key. Mitigation: corp_code + CIK are the guaranteed issuer keys; LEI is adopted as the top cross-market key only where present.

Preferred/common confusion is one digit apart (KR7005930003 vs KR7005931001; 005930 vs 005935; SSNLF vs SSNNF). A naive flat model or an unconstrained LLM will merge them. Mitigation: distinct Security nodes under a shared Issuer, enforced by must-not-link on differing ISIN.

Parent/subsidiary over-merging: 삼성전자 / 삼성SDI / 삼성물산 / Samsung Biologics share high name-token overlap and embedding proximity. Mitigation: must-not-link constraints seeded from DART 기업집단 ownership; clustering may not collapse distinct corp_codes.

Community slang and contractions (삼전, 하닉, God주) are invisible to romanization+LaBSE. Mitigation: periodic LLM alias-mining over community text, gated by human confirmation before an alias edge becomes trusted/resolvable.

Ticker-reuse lookahead bias: resolving a historical $V (or a recycled KR 종목코드) with today's mapping injects lookahead error for a human drawing conclusions. Mitigation: all alias/listing resolution is bi-temporal and queried as-of event-time, not ingest-time.

Cashtag/ticker ambiguity across markets ($X, collision of KR and US symbols): same surface form, different securities. Mitigation: alias edges carry market/venue context; ambiguous cashtags escalate to the closed-set LLM with market disambiguation, with abstain allowed.

Silent confidence drift in the LLM tier. Mitigation: monitor B-cubed and pairwise P/R on the gold set over time; treat abstain-rate spikes as a data-distribution-shift signal rather than auto-lowering thresholds.

constraints.summary: These two sub-problems are not parallel — they share one hinge, and that hinge is the deepest part of the design: **point-in-time credibility evaluated as-of knowledge-time, with corroboration scored over INDEPENDENT sources.** (A) Bi-temporal correctness stops a human from drawing conclusions on facts that weren't yet knowable; (B) credibility weighting stops the graph from ranking LOUD (many correlated voices) over TRUE (independent confirmation). The leak that connects them: if "rumor X corroborated by 3 sources" silently counts sources that only spoke up AFTER the analysis date, you reintroduce lookahead bias THROUGH the credibility channel — the subtlest leak in the system. So credibility is itself a bi-temporal quantity: a source's reputation as-of T uses only track-record resolved by T, and corroboration count as-of T uses only confirmations whose ingest/knowledge-time ≤ T. The mathematical core is two literatures fused: graph-propagation trust (TrustRank / personalized PageRank — bias the random-walk teleport vector by source priors) AND evidence aggregation (truth discovery: TruthFinder, Dawid-Skene — jointly estimate source reliability and claim veracity). CIB/pump detection feeds the math by detecting NON-independence so a coordinated cluster collapses to ~one effective source instead of multiplying credibility. Guardrail held throughout: this ranks how-corroborated / how-believable (epistemic structuring), never directional implication (forbidden trading signal). Stack: single-node Postgres (bitemporal) + graph + pgvector, batch+incremental — no Kafka/Spark/distributed-Neo4j for 1-2 consumers. Sources inlined per item below. Key refs: Graphiti/Zep (arxiv 2501.13956), SQL:2011 temporal tables (en.wikipedia.org/wiki/SQL:2011), TrustRank (Gyöngyi 2004), A Survey on Truth Discovery (dl.acm.org/doi/10.1145/2897350.2897352), Pump&Dump detection (arxiv 2301.11403), CIB detection (arxiv 2001.05658).

evaluations.name: (A) Bi-temporal edge model: dual timeline = event/valid-time + ingest/knowledge(transaction)-time, with validity intervals on EDGES
evaluations.whatItIs: Every edge (fact/relation) carries four timestamps: t_valid / t_invalid (when the fact was TRUE in the world) and t_ingested / t_expired (when the SYSTEM learned it / superseded it). This is the SQL:2011 bitemporal model — 'application-time period tables' (valid time) + 'system-versioned tables' (transaction time) combined (en.wikipedia.org/wiki/SQL:2011). Superseded facts are invalidated, NOT deleted, so history is reconstructable. Graphiti/Zep implements exactly this on a KG: 'Facts have validity windows. When information changes, old facts are invalidated — not deleted' (github.com/getzep/graphiti; arxiv.org/html/2501.13956v1).
evaluations.fitForThisCase: Directly fits a human-judgment KG over DART/KIND/EDGAR filings + 종토방/네이버/토스/Reddit/X. Filing-revisions (DART 정정공시, EDGAR 10-K/A amendments) ARE belief revisions — model them as new edges that invalidate prior ones by valid-time, both retained. Stored as bitemporal rows in single-node Postgres; no distributed system needed for 1-2 consumers.
evaluations.assumptionsOrFailureModes: FAILURE MODE the task names ('no lookahead'): the as-of-T human view MUST filter on INGEST/KNOWLEDGE-TIME ≤ T, never on valid/event-time. A fact can be true-in-world long before it was knowable; including it by event_time IS the lookahead bug. Assumes you capture true ingest-time at crawl, not DB-insert time after a batch delay. Crawl latency itself must be recorded (rumor posted t_event, you crawled t_ingest).
evaluations.cost: Low. Bitemporal rows + two btree/GiST indexes (knowledge-time, valid-time). Native in MariaDB 10.3+/SQL Server/Db2; emulated cleanly in Postgres with tstzrange + exclusion constraints.

evaluations.name: (A) Belief revision: rumor → confirmed/denied as PARALLEL credibility-weighted edges, not silent retraction
evaluations.whatItIs: A claim's life-cycle (rumored → corroborated → confirmed-by-filing, OR rumored → denied) modeled as an evolving set of assertion-edges each with its own validity interval AND credibility, linked to the resolving event. Graphiti auto-invalidates on contradiction, but that assumes a SINGLE current truth.
evaluations.fitForThisCase: A human-judgment KG must PRESERVE the competing assertions: the rumor edge, the official denial edge, the eventual confirmation. The value to a human analyst is seeing 'a tier-1 rumor on 종토방 at t0, denied by company DART filing at t1, confirmed by EDGAR 8-K at t2' as a navigable trail — NOT a graph that silently retracted the rumor. So: ADOPT Graphiti's bitemporal edge mechanics, EXTEND with a provenance+credibility layer and a policy of retain-competing-edges rather than auto-collapse-to-one-truth.
evaluations.assumptionsOrFailureModes: Graphiti's default auto-invalidate-on-contradiction would erase the rumor trail — must override to keep parallel edges with a 'superseded_by' / 'contradicted_by' relation instead of expiry. Verify Graphiti's as-of query filters on transaction-time not only valid-time before relying on it. Risk: edge proliferation — needs a 'current consensus' materialized view atop the full history.
evaluations.cost: Low-medium. Extra edge types + a resolution-status field; a nightly materialized 'as-of-now consensus' view for fast human browsing.

evaluations.name: (B) Source-reputation PRIORS via trust-weighted / personalized PageRank (graph-propagation half)
evaluations.whatItIs: Replace PageRank's uniform teleport vector with a NON-uniform prior biased toward trusted seeds: official filings (DART/KIND/SEC EDGAR) = high prior, tier-1 news = medium, 종토방/Reddit/anon/Telegram = low. This is TrustRank (Gyöngyi, Garcia-Molina, Pedersen 2004) / personalized PageRank: 'the teleportation step jumps only to trusted seeds … TrustRank biases the model toward a seed set of trusted pages to identify link spam' (users.cs.utah.edu/~jeffp; snap-stanford.github.io/cs224w-notes/network-methods/pagerank). Importance score = stationary distribution of a random walk whose restart distribution encodes provenance.
evaluations.fitForThisCase: This is the mechanism that makes importance 'fold provenance, not just topology' (constraint 3). Pure degree/eigenvector centrality ranks a viral 종토방 pump as important; teleport-prior-weighted PR demotes it because credibility enters the restart vector AND the edge weights. Seeds are unambiguous for this domain: regulators' filings are the trust anchors.
evaluations.assumptionsOrFailureModes: Teleport prior alone is necessary but NOT sufficient — it weights by source class, not by whether a specific claim was independently confirmed. Must be COMBINED with truth-discovery (next item). Risk: a low-prior source that is genuinely first/correct (a real leak on Reddit later confirmed) is under-ranked until corroboration arrives — acceptable, because as-of-T that IS the correct epistemic state (no lookahead).
evaluations.cost: Low. Personalized PageRank on a single-node graph of this size is seconds. Recompute incrementally on batch ingest.

evaluations.name: (B) Claim-veracity + source-reliability via TRUTH DISCOVERY (TruthFinder / Dawid-Skene) — the evidence-aggregation half, jointly with independence-aware corroboration
evaluations.whatItIs: The rigorous core. Truth-discovery jointly and iteratively estimates source trustworthiness AND claim veracity from conflicting unreliable sources: 'a source is trustworthy if it provides many true claims; a claim is true if asserted by many trustworthy sources' (TruthFinder, Yin/Han/Yu). Dawid-Skene gives each source a latent confusion matrix inferred by EM (dl.acm.org/doi/10.1145/2897350.2897352; arxiv.org/pdf/1409.6428). Corroboration modeled as noisy-OR / Bayesian update over INDEPENDENT sources. CIB detection (synchronized posting, language similarity, network topology — arxiv.org/pdf/2001.05658) collapses a detected coordinated cluster to ~ONE effective source so it does NOT multiply credibility. Pump&Dump signals (arxiv.org/pdf/2301.11403) flag coordinated price-timed manipulation.
evaluations.fitForThisCase: This is what ranks TRUE over LOUD: 50 synchronized 종토방/Telegram accounts = 1 effective voice, not 50. Independence is what makes corroboration real — LOUD = correlated voices, TRUE = independent confirmation. Final claim-credibility multiplies into the PageRank edge weights, so importance = topology × provenance-prior × independence-corroborated-veracity. Bilingual KR+EN sources fuse into one veracity estimate per resolved entity (after entity resolution, constraint 1).
evaluations.assumptionsOrFailureModes: CRITICAL coupling with (A): source reliability as-of T uses ONLY track-record resolved by T; corroboration count as-of T uses ONLY confirmations with knowledge-time ≤ T. Omitting this leaks lookahead through credibility. Truth-discovery assumes claims are comparable/conflicting — needs canonicalized claim objects (claim extraction must normalize '실적 서프라이즈' vs 'earnings beat' to one claim). GUARDRAIL: outputs how-corroborated, never 'high-cred → bullish' (that would be a forbidden trading signal).
evaluations.cost: Medium. EM / iterative fixpoint over claims×sources; cheap at this scale. Main cost is upstream claim extraction (gate behind constraint-4 LLM tiering: dedup→embed-sim→salience BEFORE expensive extraction).

evaluations.name: (BASELINE TO BEAT) Pure centrality + uni-temporal delete-on-update
evaluations.whatItIs: Rank nodes by raw degree/eigenvector/PageRank centrality with uniform teleport; store only current state, overwrite on update.
evaluations.fitForThisCase: This is exactly what the task says the design must BEAT. Pure centrality ranks LOUD over TRUE (a coordinated pump out-ranks a quiet true filing). Uni-temporal delete-on-update destroys point-in-time correctness AND belief-revision history — a human can no longer ask 'what did we know on date T' and gets lookahead-contaminated conclusions.
evaluations.assumptionsOrFailureModes: Fails constraints 2 and 3 simultaneously. Included only as the anchor the recommended design improves on.
evaluations.cost: Lowest compute, highest epistemic cost — wrong answers a human will trust.

constraints.recommendation:
Build TWO pipelines that JOIN at one hinge — point-in-time credibility. Do NOT treat A and B as independent.

PIPELINE A — Bitemporal temporal KG:
1. At crawl, stamp every item with t_event (when the source said it happened/posted) and t_ingest/t_knowledge (when YOU learned it). Persist both; never collapse to insert-time.
2. Extract claims → edges. Each edge gets [t_valid, t_invalid) (world-truth interval) and [t_ingested, t_expired) (system-knowledge interval) — the SQL:2011 bitemporal model (en.wikipedia.org/wiki/SQL:2011), the same dual-timeline Graphiti/Zep uses on a KG (arxiv.org/html/2501.13956v1).
3. Belief revision: a denial/confirmation/filing-amendment creates a NEW edge that links to (does not delete) the prior via 'contradicted_by'/'superseded_by'. Keep parallel competing edges — extend Graphiti rather than use its auto-collapse-to-single-truth.
4. THE no-lookahead rule: the human 'as-of T' view filters on KNOWLEDGE/INGEST-time ≤ T, never on valid/event-time. Implement as a parameterized as-of query (AS OF SYSTEM TIME-style). Verify Graphiti's as-of filters on transaction-time before depending on it.

PIPELINE B — Credibility as a first-class weight, in two layers that MUST combine:
- Layer 1 (graph propagation): personalized/Trust-weighted PageRank — teleport prior = source-class reputation (regulator filing > tier-1 news > 종토방/Reddit/anon/Telegram). This folds provenance into importance (TrustRank, Gyöngyi 2004; users.cs.utah.edu/~jeffp).
- Layer 2 (evidence aggregation): truth-discovery (TruthFinder / Dawid-Skene EM; dl.acm.org/doi/10.1145/2897350.2897352) jointly estimates per-source reliability and per-claim veracity. Corroboration = noisy-OR over INDEPENDENT sources. CIB detection (arxiv.org/pdf/2001.05658) + pump signals (arxiv.org/pdf/2301.11403) detect non-independence and collapse a coordinated cluster to ~one effective source — this is the literal mechanism that ranks TRUE over LOUD.
- Combine: final_importance(node, T) = PageRank with edge_weight = topology × source-prior × independence-corroborated-veracity(as-of T).

THE JOIN (the deep answer): credibility is itself BITEMPORAL. Source reputation as-of T uses only track-record resolved by T; corroboration as-of T counts only confirmations with knowledge-time ≤ T. Without this, you leak lookahead THROUGH the credibility channel — counting voices that hadn't spoken yet. This single rule is what makes A and B one system rather than two.

STACK (scale asymmetry): single-node Postgres = bitemporal store + graph (recursive/Apache AGE) + pgvector for GraphRAG semantic retrieval; batch+incremental recompute of PageRank/truth-discovery. Optional Obsidian as human presentation layer. RULE OUT Kafka/Spark/distributed-Neo4j — unjustified for 1-2 consumers.

GUARDRAIL (GOAL): every output is epistemic structure — how-corroborated, how-believable, ranked/clustered for a human. It must NEVER read as 'high-cred rumor → likely true → bullish.' The moment credibility implies direction, it's a forbidden trading signal.
risks: Lookahead-through-credibility (the subtle leak): if reputation/corroboration are computed on the FULL graph instead of as-of knowledge-time T, the human draws conclusions using sources that hadn't spoken yet. Mitigate: make knowledge-time a mandatory parameter of every credibility query; test with a frozen-as-of-T snapshot vs full graph and assert no high-T-only source influences the T view.

Independence is hard to verify: noisy-OR corroboration assumes sources are independent, but KR communities (종토방/네이버/토스) and US (Reddit/X, Telegram) echo each other and copy filings. If CIB clustering under-detects, correlated voices still multiply credibility (LOUD wins). Mitigate: default to LOW independence unless proven; treat shared-text / synchronized-timing as same-source.

Graphiti auto-invalidation erases the rumor→denial→confirmation trail a human needs. Mitigate: override to retain parallel competing edges; verify its as-of query filters transaction-time, not only valid-time.

Claim canonicalization debt: truth-discovery needs comparable claim objects across KR+EN ('실적 서프라이즈' = 'earnings beat'). Depends on entity resolution (constraint 1) AND claim normalization; if weak, conflicting claims don't align and veracity estimation degrades.

Guardrail erosion: a credibility-ranked KG is one inference step from a signal. Pressure to add 'so it's probably going up' must be resisted at the product level — keep outputs descriptive (corroboration, provenance, recency), never directional.
Crawl-latency bias: if t_ingest is recorded as batch-DB-insert time rather than actual fetch time, fast-moving rumor timing is distorted and as-of cuts are off. Stamp at fetch.

synthesis.referenceArchitecture:
A single-node, layered GraphRAG-style stack for 1-2 analysts: heavy continuous ingest feeds a credibility-weighted, bi-temporal knowledge graph plus a vector index, which a rigorous offline analysis layer ranks/clusters/summarizes into a navigable bilingual (KR+EN) structure exported to a read-only presentation surface. The system structures information; the human renders every investment judgment. No layer ever emits a buy/sell/price-target — sentiment, catalysts, and lead-lag are stored only as source-attributed, provenance-weighted OBSERVATIONS with caveats, never aggregated into a directional call.

THE SPINE DECISION (the one real fork). I choose an ALL-POSTGRES single engine — Postgres + pgvector + Apache AGE — over the two-engine Graphiti/FalkorDB + Postgres design, and I own the giveup. Reasoning: the landscape agent's case for BUYING Graphiti was 'hand-rolling bi-temporal supersession is the easiest place for rigor to silently fail.' But the credibility agent — who saw further — established that (a) Graphiti's default AUTO-INVALIDATES-on-contradiction, which would ERASE the rumor→denial→confirmation trail an analyst must navigate, so you must override that behavior; (b) you must independently VERIFY Graphiti's as-of queries filter on transaction-time, not just valid-time; and (c) you must bolt on provenance/credibility/ticker-anchored resolution regardless. So 'buying the bitemporal core' buys far less than it appears while forcing a second backup/restore boundary and a cross-engine consistency risk (a graph node desyncing from its Postgres provenance/resolution row silently corrupts importance and identity). Against constraint 5 (don't over-engineer; 1-2 consumers) and the fact that time-is-not-a-constraint/rigor-is, one engine with one transaction boundary covering relational + graph + vector is the coherent choice. Bi-temporal correctness is implemented explicitly as SQL:2011-style validity columns (event_time/valid_from/valid_to + ingest_time/knowledge_time), which — because it is visible, testable, and parameterized — is auditable in a way a framework's hidden semantics are not. WHAT I GIVE UP: Graphiti's free incremental dedup/episode model and its battle-tested supersession logic; I must hand-build validity-interval supersession and prove no-lookahead with frozen-as-of-T snapshot tests. This is acceptable ONLY because rigor is required and time is not constrained.

TWO THREADS RUN THROUGH EVERY LAYER. (1) NO-TRADING-SIGNAL is enforced STRUCTURALLY, not by policy: the financial ontology makes sentiment/catalysts typed, source-attributed, provenance-weighted ATTRIBUTES that the system never sums; analysis emits only FDR-surviving, effect-sized, caveated directional EDGES labeled 'information X led series Y at lag k (q<0.05)'; summarization prompts forbid buy/sell/price-target vocabulary and carry caveats verbatim. (2) CREDIBILITY IS ITSELF BI-TEMPORAL — the deepest insight in the dossier and the fusion point of the temporal and credibility layers: a source's reputation as-of T uses only track-record resolved by T, and corroboration-count as-of T counts only confirmations whose knowledge-time ≤ T. Without this rule you reintroduce lookahead THROUGH the credibility channel — ranking a claim as 'corroborated by 3 sources' using voices that only spoke up after the decision date. Every credibility/importance query takes knowledge-time as a mandatory parameter.

END-TO-END FLOW. INGEST (Dagster on one box) runs a two-tier source strategy: Tier-1 high-credibility structured spine (DART/OpenDART + corp_code registry for KR, SEC EDGAR + CIK for US, GDELT for the pre-extracted global news graph, Alpaca + CCXT/Upbit/Binance for prices) and Tier-2 adversarial community layer (종토방/네이버/토스 via Crawl4AI, crypto Telegram channel-history via Telethon MESSAGES-ONLY, X for narrow cashtag pulls only). Reddit is RULED OUT of the core (Nov-2025 pre-approval + explicit AI-training prohibition is a policy blocker for an LLM-structuring DB). Provenance + source-credibility class are stamped AT CRAWL TIME with both event_time and ingest_time (trust and point-in-time cannot be reconstructed later). A mandatory cheap pre-filter cascade runs BEFORE any LLM: trafilatura clean-text → lingua language-detect → Kiwi/MeCab-ko Korean segmentation → MinHash-LSH exact/near-dup → BGE-M3 embedding near-dup clustering (collapses copy-pasted pump consensus so it can't inflate importance) → salience/credibility gate. RESOLVE (the #1 build) anchors every entity to an authoritative ID via a three-level Issuer→Security→Listing store (LEI-where-available + DART corp_code + SEC CIK as guaranteed issuer keys; ISIN/Share-Class FIGI per security so common vs preferred are distinct; venue FIGI/ticker per listing), with tickers/cashtags/slang (삼전, 하닉) as TIME-SCOPED alias edges (never keys — $V was Vivendi then Visa). Resolution is gazetteer-anchored LINKING (bounded universe), not million-record dedup: deterministic ID join → BGE-M3/LaBSE+romanization blocking to top-k → closed-set LLM that picks among candidates OR ABSTAINS (never free-generates), with must-link (shared ID) / must-not-link (different ISIN; parent vs subsidiary from DART 기업집단) constraints; abstain → human review queue. EXTRACT emits schema-guided triples through strict function-calling: {canonical_id, relation(enum), target, source_span, source_id+credibility, event_time, ingest_time, confidence}, on a tiered cascade (Haiku-class candidate flag → Opus-4.8 schema-constrained extraction on high-salience/high-credibility survivors only, ontology prompt-cached ~90%, Batch API 50% off for backfill), with local DeBERTa NLI entailment verification reserved for high-stakes edges. STORE writes everything into Postgres: AGE graph nodes/edges with bi-temporal validity, pgvector BGE-M3 embeddings, and relational tables for the resolution master, provenance, credibility, and cost-tiering bookkeeping — one backup, one transaction. ANALYZE (scheduled batch + incremental on deltas, parameterized by as-of (T_knowledge, T_valid)) computes importance as credibility-weighted Personalized-PageRank with TrustRank teleport seeded on regulator/filing nodes — NEVER raw centrality, which ranks LOUD over TRUE — fused with truth-discovery (TruthFinder/Dawid-Skene) that estimates per-source reliability and folds independence (CIB/pump detection collapses a coordinated cluster to ~one effective source). Clustering is recursive Leiden (not Louvain) on the credibility-weighted graph FUSED with BERTopic/HDBSCAN over BGE-M3 multilingual embeddings (agreement = real theme). Info-flow is gated and rigor-critical: ADF+KPSS stationarity on returns → MI screen → Granger first pass → conditional/multivariate effective transfer entropy (conditioned on index/sector/macro common drivers) → IAAFT surrogate significance → Benjamini-Yekutieli FDR across all pairs; only FDR-surviving, effect-sized, caveated directional edges are annotated. PRESENT runs GraphRAG-style map-reduce summarization (forbidding buy/sell language, citing provenance + as-of time, exposing the credibility mix) and exports the ranked/clustered/temporal graph to Obsidian as generated, read-mostly bilingual markdown — entity pages with provenance-weighted importance, validity windows, source citations, theme notes — the navigable surface on which the human decides.

layers.choice: Single-node Dagster (asset/partition orchestrator) on ONE box, two-tier source strategy: Tier-1 structured spine (DART/OpenDART, SEC EDGAR, GDELT news graph, Alpaca + CCXT/Upbit/Binance) and Tier-2 adversarial community (종토방/네이버/토스 via Crawl4AI self-host, Telegram channel-history via Telethon messages-only, X narrow cashtag pulls). Provenance + source-credibility class + event_time/ingest_time stamped AT CRAWL TIME. Mandatory pre-filter cascade before any LLM: trafilatura → lingua → Kiwi/MeCab-ko → MinHash-LSH → BGE-M3 near-dup → salience/credibility gate.
layers.why: Constraint 5 (heavy ingest, 1-2 consumers) favors single-node batch+incremental; Dagster's asset/partition lineage gives retry/backfill visibility across many FLAKY sources (anti-bot, FloodWait, 429s, HTML drift) that bare cron lacks. GDELT pre-extracts entities/themes/tone, saving enormous LLM cost (constraint 4). Crawl-time provenance/credibility + bi-temporal stamping is non-reconstructible later (constraints 2,3). The pre-filter cascade is what keeps the LLM bill bounded (constraint 4) and collapses copy-pasted pump consensus before it can inflate importance (constraint 3). KR morphological segmentation BEFORE dedup/embedding is mandatory or 삼성전자 won't collapse (constraint 1).
layers.alternativesRejected: Kafka/Spark/distributed ingestion — RULED OUT: scale you don't have at 2 consumers, pure ops burden. Reddit as a core source — RULED OUT: Nov-2025 pre-approval gate + explicit AI/ML-training prohibition is a policy blocker for an LLM-structuring DB; include only as a minor, explicitly-approved, low-weight signal if at all. yfinance as a pipeline dependency — rejected (unofficial scraping, IP bans); Alpaca free-tier is the price backbone. Bare cron — rejected as primary (no blast-radius visibility) but kept as the documented fallback if the pipeline stays tiny.

layers.choice: Schema-guided/ontology-constrained extraction emitted through strict JSON-schema function-calling. Fixed-core, human-extensible financial ontology (Company/Person/Product/Event/Catalyst; supplies/competes_with/owns/guides_to). Output schema: {canonical_id, relation(enum), target, source_span, source_id+credibility, event_time, ingest_time, confidence}. Model tiering: Haiku-class candidate flag → Opus-4.8 schema-constrained extraction only on high-salience/high-credibility survivors (ontology prompt-cached ~90% input savings, Batch API 50% off for backfill). Local DeBERTa-class multilingual NLI entailment check reserved for high-stakes edges (supply-chain, catalysts, high-rank-but-low-credibility). Self-consistency only where a single pass is uncertain.
layers.why: A fixed relation ENUM is the only thing that makes KR and EN extractions land on the SAME edge type so a bilingual graph collapses (constraint 1). Strict function-calling makes illegal predicates and missing provenance structurally impossible and forces span+bi-temporal grounding at generation time (constraints 2,3). The ontology is where no-trading-signal is enforced STRUCTURALLY: sentiment/catalysts are typed source-attributed ATTRIBUTES the system never aggregates (GOAL). Tiering answers 'can't LLM every item' (constraint 4); model IDs/prices confirmed via claude-api skill (Opus 4.8 $5/$25, Haiku $1/$5, caching, batch).
layers.alternativesRejected: Open IE (free-form triples) as the graph of record — RULED OUT: non-canonical predicates produce different nodes AND edge labels for 삼성전자가 HBM을 공급 vs Samsung supplies HBM, breaking cross-lingual node collapse; allowed only as an optional recall-boosting candidate pass feeding canonicalization. Schema-free emergent graph — rejected: edge semantics drift per document, verification-hard, untrustworthy. LLM-on-every-crawled-item — rejected: the exact cost blow-up constraint 4 forbids. Universal NLI on every edge — rejected: cost-prohibitive; gate to high-stakes edges only.

layers.choice: Gated hybrid pipeline on a three-level Issuer→Security→Listing canonical store. Issuer keyed by LEI-where-available + DART corp_code + SEC CIK (guaranteed keys); Security by ISIN + Share-Class FIGI (common vs preferred are DISTINCT securities); Listing by venue/Composite FIGI + ticker. Tickers/cashtags/romanizations/slang (삼전, 하닉) are TIME-SCOPED alias edges [valid_from,valid_to), never keys. Cascade: deterministic official-ID join → cheap pre-filters → BGE-M3/LaBSE + romanization + alias blocking to top-k → closed-set LLM that picks among candidates OR ABSTAINS (never free-generates) → constrained clustering with must-link (shared ID) / must-not-link (different ISIN; parent vs subsidiary from DART 기업집단). Splink/Fellegi-Sunter on embedded DuckDB for batch issuer-master construction across registries (term-frequency down-weighting of 삼성/Samsung). Abstain/low-confidence → human review queue.
layers.why: This is the make-or-break #1 build — if 삼성전자=Samsung Electronics=005930 don't collapse, the graph is noise and every downstream metric is invalid (constraint 1). Anchoring to authoritative immutable IDs gives zero-false-merge guarantees; the three-level model dissolves the preferred/common and ADR/multi-venue traps structurally instead of special-casing. The bounded listed universe makes this gazetteer LINKING not million-record dedup — the simplifier that justifies single-node (constraint 5). Time-scoped aliases interlock with bi-temporal: $V resolves to Vivendi as-of-2007, Visa as-of-2026 (constraint 2, no lookahead). Abstention realizes the GOAL: AI structures, human judges. DuckDB+Splink (batch issuer-master) and Postgres (serving store) coexist — they are not competitors.
layers.alternativesRejected: Flat 'one node per company' model — RULED OUT: provably cannot represent common vs preferred (one ISIN digit apart) or ADR/OTC listings; forces false merges. End-to-end LLM free-generates the entity — RULED OUT: hallucinates IDs, silently false-merges, unbounded cost (violates constraints 1 and 4), no abstention/provenance. LLM/string dedup alone — rejected: cross-lingual identity won't resolve without registry anchoring. Spark/distributed ER — rejected: bounded universe makes it unnecessary.

layers.choice: All-Postgres single engine: Apache AGE (openCypher graph) for bi-temporal nodes/edges, pgvector (BGE-M3 embeddings, multilingual KR+EN) for semantic retrieval, and relational tables for the resolution master, provenance, credibility scores, and cost-tiering bookkeeping (dedup hashes, embedding-sim, salience). Bi-temporal modeled explicitly as SQL:2011-style columns: event_time/valid_from/valid_to + ingest_time/knowledge_time; superseded facts INVALIDATED not deleted; rumor→denial→confirmation kept as parallel competing edges via superseded_by/contradicted_by, with a nightly materialized 'current consensus' view.
layers.why: One engine = one backup, one transaction boundary covering relational+graph+vector — the simplest answer to constraint 5 and the natural home for the custom layers no off-the-shelf tool provides (ticker-anchored resolution, provenance, cost-tiering). Explicit validity columns make bi-temporal VISIBLE, testable, and parameterized by as-of (T_knowledge,T_valid) — auditable in a way a framework's hidden semantics are not (constraint 2). Vector latency (pgvector ~11ms vs Qdrant ~4ms) is irrelevant at 2 consumers. Keeping competing edges preserves the rumor trail an analyst must navigate.
layers.alternativesRejected: Graphiti on FalkorDB/Neo4j as bought temporal core — REJECTED after the credibility agent's evidence: its default auto-invalidates-on-contradiction (erasing the rumor→denial→confirmation trail), you must verify its as-of filters on transaction-time, and you must bolt on provenance/credibility/ticker-resolution anyway — so it buys less than it appears while adding a second backup/restore boundary and a cross-engine graph-vs-provenance-row desync risk. The giveup: I now hand-build validity-interval supersession (the easiest place for rigor to slip) and must prove no-lookahead with frozen-as-of-T snapshot tests. Standalone Qdrant/Weaviate/Milvus — RULED OUT: a stateful service to babysit for speed/scale 2 consumers never use. Microsoft GraphRAG static index — RULED OUT: batch/static, wrong for continuous ingest, ~16.6% accuracy drop on time-sensitive queries. Obsidian-as-backend — RULED OUT: presentation only, no query engine or temporal logic. Caveat on AGE: operationally fiddly (source install, trails newest PG majors), acceptable at this scale and rigor budget.

layers.choice: Importance = credibility-weighted Personalized-PageRank with TrustRank teleport seeded on regulator/filing nodes, FUSED with truth-discovery (TruthFinder/Dawid-Skene) estimating per-source reliability and independence-aware corroboration (CIB/pump detection collapses coordinated clusters to ~one effective source). Annotate with HITS authority, k-core, eigenvector, sampled betweenness as secondary lenses. Clustering: recursive Leiden (fixed seed) on the credibility-weighted graph FUSED with BERTopic (multilingual SBERT/BGE-M3 → UMAP[fixed seed] → HDBSCAN → c-TF-IDF). Info-flow (gated): ADF+KPSS on returns → MI screen → Granger → conditional/multivariate effective transfer entropy (conditioned on index/sector/macro) → IAAFT surrogates → Benjamini-Yekutieli FDR. All computation parameterized by as-of (T_knowledge,T_valid); credibility itself is bi-temporal (reputation/corroboration as-of T use only evidence resolved by T).
layers.why: Pure centrality ranks LOUD (pump/rumor co-mentions) over TRUE — the explicit failure constraint 3 warns of; folding credibility into edge weights AND teleport, plus independence-aware truth-discovery, ranks TRUE over LOUD. Leiden over Louvain because Louvain yields internally-disconnected communities (a correctness bug). Fusing structural Leiden with semantic BERTopic — agreement = real theme, not artifact. The stationarity→MI→Granger→conditional-TE→surrogate→FDR protocol is where rigor is actually met: bivariate TE on price levels manufactures confident common-driver garbage; conditioning + IAAFT + Benjamini-YEKULIETI (for cross-sectionally correlated market tests) is mandatory. 'Credibility is bi-temporal' is the fusion of the temporal and credibility layers — without it you leak lookahead through the credibility channel.
layers.alternativesRejected: Raw PageRank/eigenvector/HITS as primary ranking — RULED OUT: ranks manufactured co-mention/pump volume; eigenvector especially (no teleport escape, trivially gamed). HippoRAG PPR without trust priors — rejected for the same LOUD-over-TRUE reason; usable only personalized with provenance. Louvain — rejected (disconnected communities). Bivariate Granger/TE on non-stationary prices — RULED OUT: invents spurious common-driver edges, the textbook false-rigor trap. RAPTOR as the live index — rejected (static tree, hostile to incremental updates); allowed only as a periodic offline clustering pass over time-windowed slices. Any reading of a lead-lag edge as a trading signal — forbidden by the GOAL.

layers.choice: GraphRAG-style map-reduce hierarchical summarization (prioritizing high-degree + high-credibility elements) exported to Obsidian as GENERATED, read-mostly, one-way bilingual KR+EN markdown: entity pages with provenance-weighted importance, validity windows, source citations, credibility mix, and cluster/theme notes. Summarization prompts FORBID buy/sell/price-target vocabulary, cite provenance + as-of time, and carry info-flow caveats verbatim. Human annotations namespaced separately from generated content.
layers.why: For 1-2 humans making the judgment, linked markdown with provenance-weighted importance, temporal context, and citations is a navigable, auditable surface directly serving the GOAL (human navigates and decides). Obsidian is free, local, zero-infra, trivially bilingual. The forbidden-vocabulary guardrail + verbatim caveats are the last structural enforcement of no-trading-signal — a glossy summary is one sentence from an implicit call. Keeping it one-way/read-mostly prevents drift between human edits and pipeline regeneration.
layers.alternativesRejected: Obsidian as the store/backend — RULED OUT: graph view is cosmetic, no query engine, no temporal logic, poor at scale; it must be a generated export from the DB, never source of truth. A summary that aggregates sentiment into a directional view — RULED OUT by the GOAL: launders a pump cluster into a clean 'conclusion'; every summary must expose its credibility mix and never assert beyond supplied evidence. Letting humans edit generated notes the pipeline overwrites — rejected: annotations lost; namespace human notes separately.

methodsTable.method: Cross-lingual entity resolution (deterministic ID anchor → BGE-M3/LaBSE+romanization blocking → closed-set LLM with abstain → must-link/must-not-link clustering)
methodsTable.measures: Canonical identity: collapses 삼성전자/Samsung Electronics/005930 to one node, keyed to DART corp_code / SEC CIK / ISIN / LEI / FIGI before any graph metric.
methodsTable.assumptionsFailureModes: Assumes a high-precision authoritative ID exists for listed equities (true) and the universe is bounded/enumerable. Fails on silent under-merge (graph fragments → centrality meaningless) or over-merge (Samsung Electronics≡Samsung SDI → false edges); ticker reuse over time; romanization/slang variants (삼전, 하닉) invisible to LaBSE; private/pre-IPO mentions absent from the gazetteer. Mitigate with registry anchoring, time-scoped alias edges, periodic LLM alias-mining (human-gated), and an unresolved-review queue (never force-merge).
methodsTable.cost: Deterministic join: near-zero. Embedding blocking: cheap, amortized. LLM adjudication: bounded to ambiguous residue only — the dominant lever. All single-node (DuckDB/Splink + pgvector).

methodsTable.method: Bi-temporal modeling (event/valid-time + ingest/knowledge-time) on every node, edge, and credibility quantity
methodsTable.measures: Point-in-time correctness: what was knowable as-of date T; reproducible as-of-T snapshots with no lookahead, including through the credibility channel.
methodsTable.assumptionsFailureModes: Assumes sources expose/imply an event time and that crawl-time (not DB-insert time) is captured. Fatal failure: filtering the as-of-T view on event/valid-time instead of knowledge/ingest-time reintroduces lookahead; community event_time is often ambiguous (default conservatively to ingest_time, flag low-confidence). The subtle leak: computing reputation/corroboration on the full graph counts voices that hadn't spoken by T. Mitigate: knowledge-time is a mandatory query parameter; frozen-as-of-T snapshot test asserts no high-T-only source influences the T view.
methodsTable.cost: Storage overhead of versioned rows + two indexes (knowledge-time, valid-time): trivial at this scale. Real cost is ingest-pipeline discipline, not compute.

methodsTable.method: Credibility-weighted Personalized-PageRank + TrustRank teleport, fused with truth-discovery (TruthFinder/Dawid-Skene) and independence-aware corroboration (CIB/pump detection)
methodsTable.measures: Provenance-folded importance: TRUE over LOUD. Rank = topology × source-class prior × independence-corroborated veracity, with a provenance-decomposed score showing how much rank comes from trusted vs adversarial edges.
methodsTable.assumptionsFailureModes: Assumes a defensible per-source credibility prior (regulator filings high; 종토방/Reddit/Telegram low) and that corroboration counts INDEPENDENT sources. Without credibility folding, raw centrality ranks coordinated pump volume (the design failure). Independence is hard to verify — KR/US communities echo and copy filings; if CIB under-detects, correlated voices still multiply credibility. Mitigate: default to LOW independence unless proven; treat shared-text/synchronized-timing as same-source; truth-discovery needs canonicalized comparable claims (실적 서프라이즈 = earnings beat).
methodsTable.cost: Sparse power iteration on a single node: seconds-to-minutes at 10^5-10^6 nodes. Truth-discovery EM: cheap at this scale. Recompute on batch cadence + incremental on deltas.

methodsTable.method: Leiden community detection (recursive, fixed seed) on the credibility-weighted graph, FUSED with BERTopic/HDBSCAN over multilingual embeddings
methodsTable.measures: Clusters + nested hierarchy: structural communities fused with semantic themes; agreement between the two = strong evidence the theme is real, not an artifact.
methodsTable.assumptionsFailureModes: Assumes modular structure and a strong multilingual encoder so KR+EN co-cluster. Louvain (the predecessor) can yield internally DISCONNECTED communities — the specific reason to use Leiden. UMAP/HDBSCAN are stochastic (fix random_state) and HDBSCAN dumps low-density items into a noise bucket where genuine novelty AND junk both live — route it to the credibility filter, not silently into a theme. Weak multilingual embedding fragments a KR theme from its EN equivalent. Validate clusters on real 종토방/Reddit samples; report stability (consensus / variation of information), not a single fragile partition.
methodsTable.cost: Leiden: near-linear, fast single-node. UMAP+HDBSCAN: moderate, batch-recomputed; embeddings reused from the vector layer. Optional LLM label refinement: bounded.

methodsTable.method: Info-flow / lead-lag: ADF+KPSS stationarity → mutual-information screen → Granger → conditional/multivariate effective transfer entropy → IAAFT surrogates → Benjamini-Yekutieli FDR
methodsTable.measures: Directional information flow (does information arrival lead a price/other series), reported ONLY as FDR-surviving, effect-sized, caveated annotated edges — never a recommendation.
methodsTable.assumptionsFailureModes: The highest-risk stage — most likely to produce confident garbage. Bivariate TE/Granger on non-stationary price LEVELS invent spurious common-driver edges (a macro shock moves both news and price → false 'news causes price'). Finite-sample TE is biased upward. Mitigate: test stationarity on RETURNS not prices; condition on index/sector/macro common drivers; subtract surrogate bias (effective TE); IAAFT surrogates preserve autocorrelation so you don't reject the null just for being autocorrelated; Benjamini-YEKULIETI (not just Hochberg) because market test statistics are cross-sectionally correlated; build series on event-time via the bi-temporal layer to guard lookahead. The absolute trap: reading a significant edge as a trading signal.
methodsTable.cost: Granger: cheap. Conditional/multivariate TE + IAAFT + FDR across thousands of pairs: the most expensive analytic — bounded by MI-screening the pair set first and single-node batch scheduling. Time is explicitly not the constraint here; rigor is.

methodsTable.method: GraphRAG map-reduce hierarchical summarization with provenance grounding and forbidden buy/sell vocabulary; local NLI entailment on high-stakes edges
methodsTable.measures: Hierarchical theme summaries → ranked keywords + clustered conclusions + evidence + caveats (the deliverable); plus faithfulness verification of high-stakes edges (span entails triple).
methodsTable.assumptionsFailureModes: Assumes communities are coherent and the LLM summarizes only supplied evidence. Risks: hallucination/unsupported synthesis; bias-laundering (a pump cluster's summary launders manipulation into a clean 'conclusion'); lossy aggregation hiding dissent; crossing into an implicit recommendation. NLI models are imperfect and weaker in Korean (use multilingual/Korean NLI or translate-then-check). Mitigate: every summary cites provenance + as-of time, exposes its credibility mix, carries info-flow caveats verbatim; prompts forbid buy/sell/price-target language; NLI gated to supply-chain/catalyst/high-rank-low-credibility edges only.
methodsTable.cost: Summarization is the dominant LLM cost but bounded: summarize COMMUNITIES not raw items, reuse element summaries across levels, recompute only changed communities, threshold by importance/credibility. NLI: local small-model inference on a filtered subset, cheap per checked edge.

tradeoffs: Spine: all-Postgres (one engine, one transaction/backup, no cross-engine desync, explicit auditable bi-temporal) vs Graphiti/FalkorDB (free incremental episode model + tested supersession). I chose all-Postgres because the credibility agent showed Graphiti's auto-invalidation would erase the rumor trail an analyst needs and you must bolt on provenance/resolution anyway — but I now own hand-rolling validity-interval supersession, the easiest place for rigor to silently fail.

Apache AGE is operationally fiddly (source install, no reliable prebuilt image, trails newest PG majors, less mature deep-traversal Cypher than Neo4j) — acceptable only because traversal depth is shallow at this scale and time/rigor budget absorbs the setup-and-upgrade tax.

pgvector (~11ms) vs a dedicated vector store (~4ms): I deliberately give up vector-search latency/scale, which is irrelevant at 1-2 consumers, to avoid a stateful service to snapshot/secure/version. Reconsider only if embedding volume balloons past ~50M.

Cost-tiering trades coverage for affordability: cheap models are materially weaker in Korean, so a language-blind triage false-negative permanently drops a KR item before the good model sees it. Mitigation (Korean-aware thresholds + periodic frontier audits of dropped KR items) costs ongoing tuning and can never be perfect.

Self-hosted Crawl4AI keeps cost near-zero and data in-house but its true cost is hidden DevOps (Playwright browser servers, proxy rotation, parser maintenance against shifting Korean portal HTML). Firecrawl SaaS is the paid escape hatch only for the few hostile anti-bot targets.

Aggressive pre-extraction dedup cuts LLM cost AND prevents fake consensus from inflating importance, but over-aggressive merging can collapse genuinely distinct events phrased alike — thresholds must be tuned per source and validated.

Conditional/multivariate transfer entropy with surrogates and FDR is far more expensive and complex than bivariate Granger, and buys correctness, not speed — justified only because rigor is the explicit goal and time is not constrained.

The dynamic-hybrid ontology (fixed core + human-gated new relation types) trades recall (a static ontology caps novel supply-chain/catalyst relations) against consistency (a loose one breaks node collapse) — and only works if the human review queue is actually maintained.
whatYouGiveUp: The system DELIBERATELY emits no actionable signal — no buy/sell, no price target, no aggregated directional view. Its value is only as good as the human driving it; a passive or unskilled operator gets a beautifully organized structure and no edge. This is the GOAL, not a defect, but it is what you give up versus a signal-generating system.

Most of the load-bearing rigor — ticker-anchored cross-lingual entity resolution, provenance-weighted/independence-aware importance, and the gated info-flow pipeline — has NO off-the-shelf implementation. This is a large custom build with no batteries-included substitute; the engineering is the project.

By choosing all-Postgres I give up Graphiti's free incremental dedup, episode model, and battle-tested bi-temporal supersession, and take on the single easiest place for rigor to silently fail (validity-interval supersession), mitigated only by disciplined frozen-as-of-T snapshot testing.

I give up Reddit as a core US-retail source (Nov-2025 AI-training prohibition) and broad continuous X ingestion (pay-per-use economics) — the US-retail/social sentiment tier is thinner and more compliance-constrained than the KR tier; Telegram crypto channels and narrow X cashtag pulls partly fill the gap.

I give up vector-search latency/throughput and any distributed serving capability (Kafka/Spark/distributed-Neo4j/Qdrant) — fine at 1-2 consumers, but the design does not scale to a many-user product without re-architecting the serving side.

Cluster/theme quality on noisy bilingual Korean retail slang is unproven; without a strong multilingual encoder and KR-aware prompts the hierarchy may be incoherent — you give up confidence in the clustering until it's validated on real 종토방/Reddit samples.

Obsidian presentation is read-mostly and one-way; you give up live human editing of generated notes (annotations would be overwritten) — human notes must live in a separate namespace, a usability constraint on the analyst's workflow.
phasing: PHASE 0 (MVP spine, structurally-correct + high-credibility first): Stand up single Postgres + pgvector + Apache AGE. Build the Issuer→Security→Listing canonical store and deterministic ID resolution seeded from DART corp_code + SEC CIK registries (no community sources yet). Ingest ONLY Tier-1 structured spine (DART, EDGAR, GDELT, Alpaca/CCXT) via Dagster, stamping event_time + ingest_time. This gives a correct, low-noise bilingual graph before any adversarial data — the advisor's ordering: build the high-credibility spine first.

PHASE 1 (extraction + bi-temporal): Add schema-guided extraction through strict function-calling with the fixed-core financial ontology, emitting the full provenance schema. Implement explicit bi-temporal validity columns + supersession (parallel competing edges) and the frozen-as-of-T snapshot test asserting no lookahead. Add the cheap pre-filter cascade (trafilatura→lingua→Kiwi→MinHash→BGE-M3) and Haiku→Opus tiering with prompt-caching/batch.

PHASE 2 (importance with credibility): Implement credibility-weighted Personalized-PageRank + TrustRank teleport seeded on filing nodes, plus truth-discovery (TruthFinder/Dawid-Skene), making reputation/corroboration bi-temporal (as-of T). Now — and only now that credibility weighting exists to protect against LOUD-over-TRUE — begin adding the Tier-2 adversarial community sources (종토방/네이버/토스 via Crawl4AI, Telegram via Telethon) at LOW credibility weight, with closed-set LLM resolution + abstain + human review queue.

PHASE 3 (clustering + presentation): Add recursive Leiden + BERTopic fusion for the navigable theme hierarchy and the GraphRAG map-reduce summarization with forbidden buy/sell vocabulary. Build the one-way DB→Obsidian bilingual markdown exporter. Validate clusters on real 종토방/Reddit samples before trusting the hierarchy. At this point the analyst has a usable navigable surface.

PHASE 4 (the dangerous analytic, last): Build the gated info-flow pipeline (ADF+KPSS→MI→Granger→conditional/multivariate effective TE→IAAFT→Benjamini-Yekutieli FDR) producing only FDR-surviving, effect-sized, caveated directional edges. Built LAST, deliberately, because it is the most likely to mislead and must sit behind the credibility weighting and no-signal guardrails that already exist. Add periodic offline RAPTOR-style enrichment and local NLI verification on high-stakes edges as final polish.
openQuestions: LOAD-BEARING (the cost of the all-Postgres choice): the frozen-as-of-T no-lookahead test must be designed and proven before the analyst trusts any as-of conclusion — specifically that NO credibility/reputation/corroboration computation leaks knowledge-time > T. If hand-rolled validity-interval supersession can't be proven correct, the Graphiti-on-FalkorDB fallback re-enters consideration.

OpenDART daily call quota could not be confirmed from official pages (only that limits are posted and FSS-adjustable) — verify the live number before scaling KR ingest, and size the crawl budget conservatively until then.

What is the minimum viable source-credibility prior taxonomy, and how is it calibrated/audited over time? Track abstain-rate spikes and B-cubed/pairwise P/R on a hand-labeled KR+EN gold set as data-distribution-shift signals rather than auto-lowering thresholds.

Is a strong-enough multilingual embedding + KR-aware extraction prompt available to make BERTopic/Leiden co-cluster KR and EN themes coherently on noisy retail slang? Must be validated on held-out KR+EN pairs before the cluster hierarchy is trusted.

Independence verification for corroboration: how aggressively can CIB/pump detection collapse coordinated 종토방/Telegram clusters to ~one effective source without over-merging legitimate independent confirmation? Default-low-independence is the safe stance, but its false-negative cost (suppressing real corroboration) needs measurement.

Claim canonicalization debt: truth-discovery requires comparable claim objects across KR+EN (실적 서프라이즈 = earnings beat). How robust is the claim-normalization step, and does it degrade gracefully when entity resolution or normalization is weak?

Telegram/X account and legal risk: how durable is messages-only Telethon capture against FloodWait/PeerFlood, and what is the acceptable legal/TOS posture for KR portal scraping given ongoing HTML drift and parser maintenance?

criticalFlaws: FALSE PREMISE UNDER THE SPINE DECISION (the doc's single most important fork). The all-Postgres choice is justified primarily by the claim that Graphiti 'auto-invalidates-on-contradiction, which would ERASE the rumor->denial->confirmation trail.' This is factually wrong, verified from two independent sources (getzep/graphiti README + Neo4j/Zep docs): Graphiti is explicitly bi-temporal and 'invalidates -- not deletes' -- it closes the validity window via invalid_at/expired_at and KEEPS the superseded edge, queryable point-in-time. The rumor trail is preserved by exactly the mechanism the doc says it lacks. The CONCLUSION (all-Postgres) still stands on the OTHER reasons (you need Postgres anyway for resolution/provenance/credibility/cost tables, so Graphiti = 2 engines + cross-engine desync), but the headline justification must be struck or the whole spine rationale looks unaudited.

ENTITY-RESOLUTION THROUGHPUT IS THE REAL NOISE GENERATOR, and it's undersized. 'Abstain -> human review queue' is the ER safety valve, but heavy *continuous* ingest divided by 1-2 humans means the abstain queue cannot be drained. Two outcomes, both bad: (a) queue grows unbounded, those mentions never enter the graph, ER silently UNDER-merges, graph fragments, and centrality becomes meaningless -- the doc's OWN stated failure mode (constraint 1); or (b) humans rubber-stamp to keep up, producing false merges (Samsung Electronics == Samsung SDI), false edges, corrupted importance. The doc presents abstention as a clean GOAL win; at this ingest:human ratio it is a chokepoint that degrades the graph either way. There is no autoscaling for human attention. This, not the spine, is the project's highest risk.

TRUTH-DISCOVERY (TruthFinder/Dawid-Skene) IS A HARD BLOCKER MISFILED AS AN OPEN QUESTION. These estimators only work when multiple sources assert the SAME claim object. Deciding that a Korean span and an English span assert the same claim (실적 서프라이즈 == 'beat estimates') is itself an unsolved cross-lingual extraction problem. If claim-canonicalization is weak, there are no comparable units, corroboration counts are wrong, and the entire TRUE-over-LOUD ranking story -- the answer to constraint 3 -- degrades to noise. The whole credibility edifice rests on a normalization step the doc lists under openQuestions.

SURVIVORSHIP / DELISTING LOOK-AHEAD -- the doc is completely silent. All the bi-temporal rigor concerns fact event-time vs knowledge-time, but the entity UNIVERSE is implicitly the currently-listed set (active DART corp_code / live EDGAR registries). Delisted, merged, and bankrupt issuers disappear from the gazetteer, so any historical importance ranking or lead-lag analysis is computed only over survivors -- the textbook survivorship/look-ahead bias the task explicitly names.
